[4969]
Security Advisory on Permissive Web Security Policy Allows Cross-Origin Access Control Bypass on Omada Cloud Controllers and Insufficient Certificate Validation in Multiple Mobile Applications Allows Man in the Middle Interception (CVE-2025-9292 and CVE-2025-9293)

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: [4969] Security Advisory on Permissive Web Security Policy Allows Cross-Origin Access Control Bypass on Omada Cloud Controllers and Insufficient Certificate Validation in Multiple Mobile Applications Allows Man in the Middle Interception (CVE-2025-9292 and CVE-2025-9293)
